name: -o
--output
options.description: Output format

--watch
options.description: Watch for changes after listing/getting the requested objects

options.description: Show all labels as the last column

options.description: Sort list types using the specified field

--filename
options.description: Filename to identify the resource to get

options.name: --field-selector
options.description: Selector to filter on (field query)

options.name: --no-headers
options.description: Do not print headers

name: -f
--filename
options.description: Filename to identify the resource to describe

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.description: Apply a configuration to a resource by file name or stdin

name: -f
--filename
options.description: Files that contain the configurations to apply

name: -k
--kustomize
options.description: Process a kustomization directory

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Must be none, server, or client

options.name: --force
options.description: Delete and re-create the resource if needed

options.name: --prune
options.description: Automatically delete resource objects that do not appear in the configs

name: -R
--recursive
options.description: Process the directory used in -f recursively

options.name: --server-side
options.description: Submit server-side request

subcommands.description: Delete resources by file names, stdin, resources, or by resources and names

name: -f
--filename
options.description: Files that contain the resources to delete

options.name: --all
options.description: Delete all resources in the namespace

options.name: --grace-period
options.description: Period of time in seconds given to the resource to terminate gracefully

options.name: --force
options.description: Immediately remove resources from API and bypass graceful deletion

options.name: --now
options.description: Signal immediate shutdown

options.name: --cascade
options.description: Must be background, orphan, or foreground

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Must be none, server, or client

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: Print the logs for a container in a pod

name: -f
--follow
options.description: Specify if the logs should be streamed

name: -c
--container
options.description: Print the logs of this container

name: -p
--previous
options.description: Print the logs for the previous instance of the container

options.name: --since
options.description: Only return logs newer than a relative duration like 5s, 2m, or 3h

options.name: --since-time
options.description: Only return logs after a specific date (RFC3339)

options.name: --tail
options.description: Lines of recent log file to display

options.name: --timestamps
options.description: Include timestamps on each line

options.name: --all-containers
options.description: Get all containers' logs in the pod

options.name: --max-log-requests
options.description: Specify maximum number of concurrent logs to follow

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Prefix each log line with the pod and container name

options.description: Container name
